svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 280px; margin-left: 345px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(227, 218, 204), rgb(56, 48, 36)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(201, 188, 166), rgb(84, 73, 54));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 922px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 18px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #141413;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#141413, #dcdcdb); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: AI 텍스트 산출물 — 후처리 체인(ai-slop → humanize)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 87), rgb(187, 103, 76)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 92, 62), rgb(207, 128, 102));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 90px; margin-left: 361px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① AI 초안
블로그 · 뉴스레터 · 카피 · 사업계획서
(기계 티 포함)
